title: ae2wtlib ae2 style crafting terminal
description: Change ae2wtlib's wireless crafting terminal to look more like ae2's
body:
Thanks to AE2's amazing screen system, it is possible to change the layout of the screen with just a resource pack.
This resource pack changes ae2wtlib's wireless crafting terminal to look more like ae2's wireless crafting terminal without ae2wtlib installed.

This texturepack:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/12Zt1lua/images/d66298a02da7587bc26beb511455959b03d835a1.png)

AE2wtlib:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/12Zt1lua/images/14e976b06b7fd3e451b09ff20bd45d50303f1dd7.png)

Just AE2:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/12Zt1lua/images/0b92bc9250e7b9a12c96da25cb85cd1976157c1f.png)
